arts.ttl: Galatasaray Eye Udinese’s Festy Ebosele as Right-Back Option
arts.sum: Galatasaray have turned their attention to Festy Ebosele, a right-back owned by Udinese and currently on loan at Watford, as they search for reinforcements in the January transfer window. The Turkish club is in need of a new right-back after their initial target, Emerson Royal of AC Milan, suffered a serious injury during a Champions League match, derailing ongoing negotiations. arts.ttl: Serie A | Roma v Udinese: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Roma prepare to face Udinese in Serie A, manager Claudio Ranieri finds himself in the enviable position of having a fully fit squad at his disposal. However, with the team's recent Europa League exertions in Alkmaar and a crucial upcoming match against Eintracht Frankfurt, changes to the starting lineup are expected.
